message:
STUCK LOOP DETECTED — You are repeating read-only commands without progress.
MANDATORY RECOVERY — follow these steps IN ORDER:
1. Do NOT run ls, dir, cat, Get-Content, or view. You already know what files exist.
2. Create the NEXT missing file using str_replace_editor create.
Files you have ALREADY created: app.py, database.py, index.html, models.py, test_app.py. Do NOT re-create them. Create the NEXT file that is still missing.
3. After creating it, immediately create the next one.
4. When all files are created, call finish().
YOUR VERY NEXT ACTION MUST BE a file create or edit — nothing else.
